footer.description: Your trusted travel partner for unforgettable experiences in Marsa Alam and beyond. Explore, customize, and send your booking request easily — we'll handle the rest.

about.label: Explore Our Story
about.title: About Us
about.description1: We are a local travel company based in Marsa Alam, helping international tourists discover the beauty of Egypt through carefully planned tours and packages.
about.description2: From transportation and tour guides to SIM cards and local support, we take care of every detail to make your trip smooth, comfortable, and unforgettable.

rev1.name: Arlene McCoy
rev1.title: Very Professional Service
rev1.text: Booking the taxi was simple and the team contacted us quickly to confirm everything. The driver was friendly and the vehicle was modern

featuredTrips.title: Our Featured trips
featuredTrips.subtitle: Discover the most exciting activities — from snorkeling and island trips to desert rides and historical excursions.

services_section.title: Our Services
services_section.subtitle: Everything you need to plan, explore, and enjoy your trip with ease. Smart services designed to make your travel experience simple from start to finish.
services_section.taxi_desc: Comfortable private transfers from marsa alam airport to your hotel and trips between destinations.
services_section.sim_desc: Stay connected during your trip with ready-to-use data packages delivered on arrival.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.subtitle: Stay, explore, and experience more with curated travel bundles that combine top destinations and seamless planning.

builder.title: Build Your Package
builder.description: Choose how many days you want, explore available trips, and create your perfect package in minutes.
